metadata.description: Agent skills — multi-agent evaluation systems, C-to-Rust migration, composable pipelines, mobile testing, browser automation, and design systems for AI coding assistants

plugins.name: full-eval
plugins.description: Complete strategic + personal evaluation — runs 6 business evaluators and 8 life advisors in parallel, cross-references their outputs, generates PDF report

plugins.name: hackathon-jury
plugins.description: Simulate a real hackathon jury — researches actual judges, builds personas, runs parallel evaluations, synthesizes deliberation with pitch coaching

plugins.name: vc-evaluator
plugins.description: Simulate a VC investment panel — researches real investors in your sector, builds personas, runs parallel evaluations, synthesizes partner meeting deliberation

plugins.name: architect
plugins.description: Evaluate ideas and projects from 6 angles simultaneously — market, technical, risk, impact, resources, innovation — with synthesis and scoring

plugins.name: council-skill
plugins.description: Advisory council — 8 parallel specialist advisors covering finance, health, career, relationships, and more, with unified synthesis

plugins.name: c-cpp-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze C/C++ code for Rust migration — classify difficulty, detect patterns, plan conversion strategy

plugins.name: rust-migration
plugins.description: C/C++ to idiomatic Rust conversion patterns — memory management, error handling, pointer translation, quality gates

plugins.name: migration-validator
plugins.description: Validate C-to-Rust migrations — safety checks, unsafe minimization, semantic equivalence, idiomatic scoring

plugins.name: demo-pipeline
plugins.description: Natural language to automated demo recording — discovers screens, generates script, executes with Maestro or webreel, outputs video + screenshots + report

plugins.name: e2e-pipeline
plugins.description: Auto-generate and run E2E tests from static codebase analysis — discovers flows, generates Maestro tests with assertions, reports pass/fail

plugins.name: maestro-mobile-testing
plugins.description: Comprehensive Maestro E2E testing patterns for React Native/Expo — 11 patterns, auth testing, CI/CD, MCP integration

plugins.name: webreel
plugins.description: Scripted browser demo videos with cursor animation, keystroke overlays, and sound effects from JSON config

plugins.name: agent-browser
plugins.description: Browser automation for AI agents via inference.sh — navigate, interact with @e refs, scrape, record video

plugins.name: mobile-design-system
plugins.description: Mobile UI/UX design system — React Native components, touch interactions, gestures, accessibility, iOS and Android conventions

plugins.name: ios-glass-ui
plugins.description: iOS-native glass material UI design — translucency, blur, depth following Apple Human Interface Guidelines

plugins.name: app-store-screenshots
plugins.description: App Store and Google Play screenshot creation with exact platform specs, gallery ordering, device mockups, and captions

plugins.name: pdf-presentation
plugins.description: Generate professional PDF reports and presentations from evaluations, proposals, and structured content
